pemandangannya keren, udaranya seger apalagi kalo pagi pagi..
harga tiket cukup terjangkau..
banyak pedagang dan jual souvenir disekitar kawah..
english_translation:
A suitable place for healing...
The view is cool, the air is fresh, especially in the morning..
The ticket price is quite affordable..
There are many vendors selling souvenirs around the crater..

text:
Tempat hiking yang nyaman, sejuk, angin segar, pepohonan besar..
Track jalan yg nyaman menanjak..
Banyak warung tempat istirahat dan makan..
Pengalaman yg menyenangkan.. 🤩🤩🤩 …
english_translation:
A comfortable, cool hiking spot with fresh air and large trees.
The path is comfortable and uphill.
Many stalls for resting and eating.
A pleasant experience. 🤩🤩🤩

text: Tempat camping yang cukup aman cocok untuk pemula, fasilitas terdapat tempat parkir, wc dan warung angkringan harga tiket untuk camping 17.500 ada juga tempat untuk paint ball
english_translation: A camping spot that is quite safe and suitable for beginners. Facilities include a parking area, toilets, and an "angkringan" (street food stall). The ticket price for camping is 17,500. There is also a paintball area.
aspects: spot, facility, parking, restroom, price, attraction
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, positive, neutral, positive
real_aspect: spot, Facilities, parking, toilets, price, paintball

text: Lokasi tidak terlalu jauh dari Bandung, berbagai jenis bunga  ada walaupun masih sedikit, karena area juga tidak terlalu luas. Bagus untuk spot photo2. Ada tempat untuk sholat
english_translation: The location is not too far from Bandung. Various types of flowers are available, although still few, because the area is also not too wide. Good for photo spots. There is a prayer room.

text: Seru banget mengunjungi kebun begonia, banyak spot buat berfoto2, bunganya indah2, anak2 dan ortu senang, lokasi cukup jauh ya, lembang ke atas lagi. Tp pas kesini puas banget
english_translation: It was really fun visiting the begonia garden. There are many photo spots, the flowers are beautiful, the kids and parents were happy. The location is quite far, Lembang and then further up. But coming here, I was very satisfied.

text:
Segeeerrr bgt kalo ksini...bebas dr udara kotor (polusi)
Banyak pohon pinus dan cemara, juga bisa bgt buat kemping di area pinus, jadi tambah pengalaman lagi di tempat wisata.
english_translation:
So refreshing if you come here... free from dirty air (pollution)
Lots of pine and fir trees, it's also very suitable for camping in the pine area, so it adds to the experience at the tourist spot.

text: Kayaknya pas sampe Sanghyang harus track dulu gan, bagus buat bakar lemak haha. Kalau mau sepi, datang jam 3 sore gan, kaya layang-layang. Nikmati, ada penjaga sampai senja
english_translation: It seems like when you reach Sanghyang, you have to track first, bro. It's good for burning fat, haha. If you want it to be quiet, come at 3 PM, bro, like a kite. Enjoy, there's a guard until dusk.

text: ada 2 curuk cuma untuk foto2 dari jauh saja. tidak bisa bermain dengan air2nya karena cukup berbahaya. lumayan untuk foto2 sedikit apa lagi bila bs mencari posisi foto yg baik
english_translation: There are 2 coves, only for taking photos from afar. You cannot play in the water because it is quite dangerous. It's okay for taking a few photos, especially if you can find a good photo spot.

text:
Hawa sejuk, banyak pepohonan, ada area kamping kebun teh, jurug air dingin bangettttt, bagus buat jalan jalan naik turun banyak tangga nya ......
lumayan kaki harus kuat 🤓🤠😎 …
english_translation: Cool air, lots of trees, there's a tea garden camping area, the waterfall is super cold, good for walking up and down lots of stairs... Legs need to be strong 🤓🤠😎...
real_aspect: air, trees, tea garden, waterfall, walking

text:
Seru banget tempat ini pokoknya
Sangat luas
Banyak sekali spot
Apalagi skrg bnyk yg barunya
Ada kolam renang, ada kota mini, ada rainbow slide
Pokoknya seru banget main kesini
english_translation:
This place is really exciting, period.
Very spacious
Lots of spots
Especially now that there are many new additions

aspects: place, spaciousness, spot, facility, facility, facility, attraction

text: Liat di Instagram kayanya ok banget , pas berkunjung ke sana ternyata biasa aja, tmp nya baru 60% yg selesai dibuat, sepertinya terlalu dipaksakan untuk segera bisa dikunjungi
english_translation: Saw it on Instagram and it looked really good, but when I visited, it was just okay. The place was only 60% finished, it seems like they rushed it to be open for visitors.

text: Curugnya sangat indah dan menarik sekali untuk di kunjungi suasana nya sangat adem, hanya saja jalan menuju Curug agak sedikit rusak, selebihnya keren, berada di Bandung barat
english_translation: The waterfall is very beautiful and interesting to visit, the atmosphere is very cool, only the road to the waterfall is a bit damaged, otherwise it's great, located in West Bandung

text: Suasana dingin tak menghalangi melihat keajaiban kisah Sangkuriang dan Nyai Sumbi😄 spoot foto yang keren juga melihat kawah tangkuban perahu ... rekom wisata bersama keluarga …
english_translation: The cold atmosphere doesn't hinder seeing the magic of the Sangkuriang and Nyai Sumbi story😄 cool photo spots, also seeing the Tangkuban Perahu crater... recommended for family tourism…

text:
Tempat yang bagus untuk berkemah bersama keluarga, teman, kerabat,

Suasana asri, sejuk dan panorama alam yang indah memanjakan mata,

Poko y direkomendasikan untuk berkemah
english_translation:
A great place to camp with family, friends, relatives,

The natural, cool atmosphere and beautiful natural panorama are pleasing to the eye,

Basically recommended for camping

text: Jalanan menuju lokasi sangat terjal dan sempit, parkir tempat wisata dengan parkir oleh juru parkir berbeda (double biaya parkir), tidak disarankan untuk membawa stroller bayi.
english_translation: The road to the location is very steep and narrow, parking at the tourist spot with parking by attendants is different (double parking fee), it is not recommended to bring a baby stroller.

text:
Bagus tempatnya.. tp jgn musim hujan airnya keruh..
Untuk biaya gaet nya terlalu mahal untuk jatak 1,5 km.. mohon di atur biaya gaetnya sehingga org akan lbh banyak datang..🙏 …
english_translation: The place is nice.. but don't go during the rainy season as the water will be murky. The boat rental fee is too expensive for just 1.5 km.. please adjust the boat rental fee so more people will come.. 🙏

text: Seru juga tempatnya lumayan luas, ga cukup waktu buat explor semua, ada beberapa wahana yang bayar lagi didalam. Tiket bisa dituker minuman di depan, ini foto di rainbow garden
english_translation: It's fun, the place is quite spacious, not enough time to explore everything, there are some rides that require additional payment inside. Tickets can be exchanged for drinks at the front, this is a photo at the rainbow garden

text: Mau pagi siang sore atau malam hari, berada di sini sangat menyenangkan. Pemandangan kota bandung dan pemandangan alam yang tidak akam mengecewalan bagi semua orang yang datang
english_translation: Morning, noon, afternoon, or night, being here is very enjoyable. The views of Bandung city and the natural scenery will not disappoint anyone who comes.

text: nice place cocok banget untuk melepas penat dari kehidupan perkotaan!! udaranya super sejuk dah tempatnya pun nyaman dengan berbagai fasilitas, harganya masih masuk akal kok👍 …
english_translation: nice place, really suitable for relieving fatigue from city life!! the air is super cool and the place is comfortable with various facilities, the price is still reasonable 👍

text:
Dengan tiket masuk dibandingkan fasilitas tidak sebanding.
Lebih ke tempat makan dan berkumpul.
Ada beberapa permainan untuk anak2. Flying fox, ATV, Tree house, animal feeding.
english_translation:
The entrance fee is not comparable to the facilities.
It's more of a dining and gathering place.
There are some games for children. Flying fox, ATV, Tree house, animal feeding.

text: Keren.... Tapi akses masuknya belom tersentuh pembangunan, jalanan belom aspal atau beton dan masih berwujud batu pasir, kalau kesana pas hujan hati hati, licin. Bagusnya sore.
english_translation: Amazing.... But the access road hasn't been developed yet, the road isn't asphalted or concreted and is still made of sandstone. If you go there during the rain, be careful, it's slippery. It's nice in the afternoon.

text:
Tempat wisata yang lumayan enak lihat pemandangan kawah disiang hari
Tiket masuk 1 motor 2 orang 54 rb, jajanan lumayan murah sosis bakar 15 rb jasuke 10 rb. Pengen kesana lagi
english_translation: A tourist spot that’s quite nice for viewing the crater scenery during the day. Entrance fee for 1 motorcycle and 2 people is 54 thousand, snacks are reasonably cheap: grilled sausage 15 thousand, sweet corn with cheese and milk 10 thousand. Want to go there again.
aspects: spot, view, scenery, entrance, price, food
sentiment: positive, positive, positive, neutral, neutral, positive
real_aspect: spot, viewing, scenery, Entrance, fee, snacks

text: Tempat wisata family friendly di daerah Lembang. Ada banyak wahana seperti Kota Mini (masuknya harus beli tiket lagi), Kampung Jepang (bisa sewa baju kimono dan foto-foto) dsb.
english_translation: Family-friendly tourist spots in the Lembang area. There are many attractions like Kota Mini (requires a separate ticket), Japanese Village (you can rent kimono and take photos), etc.
